cards.grammarNote: très + adjective/adverb = very. très bien = very well. très grand = very big. très is never used alone with a noun — use beaucoup for quantity.
trop + adjective = too (excessive). trop chaud = too hot. trop de + noun = too much/many: trop de bruit = too much noise.
C'est trop can mean 'that's too much' (quantity) or 'it's excessive'. Context makes it clear.

cards.front: not too much / not too bad
cards.grammarNote: pas trop = not too. pas trop loin = not too far. pas trop mal = not too bad (a common response to 'ça va?').
Pas mal = not bad / pretty good. A common relaxed response to comment ça va?
